data.value: New role must be different from current role

data.value: Occurred date is required.

data.value: The occurred date must not be later than the current date and time.

data.value: Description is required and cannot be empty.

data.value: You don't have a CV yet. Please upload your CV before applying.

data.name: JobPosting.AlreadyPlaced
data.value: You already have an internship.

data.name: JobPosting.OnlyPublishedAllowed
data.value: Only published jobs can be closed

data.name: JobPosting.ConfirmHasActiveApplications
data.value: There are candidates applying for this position. Are you sure you want to proceed?

data.name: JobPosting.NotifyStudentClosedSubject
data.value: Notification: "{{0}}" has been closed

data.name: JobPosting.NotifyStudentClosedBody
data.value: The job posting "{{0}}" from {{1}} has been closed and is no longer accepting new applications.

data.name: JobPosting.CloseSuccess
data.value: Successfully closed job posting "{{0}}"

data.name: JobPosting.TitleRequired
data.value: Title is required to save a draft.

data.name: JobPosting.DraftSavedSuccess
data.value: Draft saved.

data.name: JobPosting.TitleTooLong
data.value: Job posting titles must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: JobPosting.DescriptionTooLong
data.value: Description is too long.

data.name: JobPosting.RequirementsTooLong
data.value: Requirements is too long.

data.name: JobPosting.BenefitTooLong
data.value: Benefit is too long.

data.name: JobPosting.LocationRequired
data.value: Location is required

data.name: JobPosting.LocationTooLong
data.value: Location is too long.

data.name: JobPosting.QuantityMustBePositive
data.value: Quantity must be 0 or greater.

data.name: JobPosting.ExpireDateMustBeTodayOrLater
data.value: Expire date must be today or later.

data.name: JobPosting.StartDateMustBeTodayOrLater
data.value: Start date must be today or later.

data.name: JobPosting.EndDateMinDuration
data.value: End date must be at least {0} days after start date.

data.name: JobPosting.EndDateMaxDuration
data.value: End date must be at most {0} days after start date.

data.name: JobPosting.StartDateRequired
data.value: Start date is required.

data.name: JobPosting.EndDateRequired
data.value: End date is required.

data.name: JobPosting.AudienceInvalid
data.value: Audience is invalid.

data.name: JobPosting.UniversityRequiredForTargetAudience
data.value: University must be provided for targeted audience.

data.name: JobPosting.AlreadyDeleted
data.value: This job has already been deleted.

data.name: JobPosting.DeleteConfirmHasActiveApplications
data.value: This job currently has {0} active applications. Are you sure you want to delete it?

data.name: JobPosting.DeleteSuccess
data.value: Job '{0}' deleted successfully

data.name: JobPosting.DeleteWithActiveApplications
data.value: Job '{0}' deleted successfully. Existing applications remain.

data.name: JobPosting.DeleteVersionConflict
data.value: The job has been modified by another user. Please reload the page and try again.

data.name: JobPosting.NotFound
data.value: This job could not be found.

data.name: JobPosting.PublishSuccess
data.value: The job posting has been published.

data.name: JobPosting.AlreadyPublished
data.value: Job is already published.

data.name: JobPosting.ExpireDateRequired
data.value: Expire date is required.

data.name: JobPosting.AudienceRequired
data.value: Audience is required.

data.name: JobPosting.UpdateConfirmHasApplications
data.value: This job has {0} application(s). Updating may affect existing applications. Confirm update?

data.name: JobPosting.ReopenExpireDateInvalid
data.value: Invalid expiration date when reopening the job.

data.name: JobPosting.UpdateQuantityLessThanPlaced
data.value: The updated quantity cannot be less than the quantity already placed ({0}).

data.name: JobPosting.UpdateInvalidUniversities
data.value: The list of universities is invalid.

data.name: JobPosting.TargetedRequiresSingleUniversity
data.value: Targeted audience requires selecting a single university.

data.name: JobPosting.ReopenNotifyStudentSubject
data.value: Job Opportunity: {0}

data.name: JobPosting.ReopenNotifyStudentBody
data.value:
>Dear Student,

The job {0} from {1} has been reopened. If you are interested, please visit the system for more details and submit your application.

Best regards.

data.name: JobPosting.ReopenSuccess
data.value: Job "{0}" has been successfully reopened.

data.name: JobPosting.NotAllowed
data.value: You do not have permission to access this resource.

data.name: InternshipPhase.EnterpriseIdRequired
data.value: Enterprise ID (EnterpriseId) is required.

data.name: InternshipPhase.PhaseIdRequired
data.value: Phase ID (PhaseId) is required.

data.name: InternshipPhase.NameRequired
data.value: Internship phase name is required.

data.name: InternshipPhase.NameMaxLength
data.value: Internship phase name must not exceed 255 characters.

data.name: InternshipPhase.StartDateRequired
data.value: Start date (StartDate) is required.

data.name: InternshipPhase.EndDateRequired
data.value: End date (EndDate) is required.

data.name: InternshipPhase.EndDateAfterStartDate
data.value: End date must be after start date.

data.name: InternshipPhase.MaxStudentsGreaterThanZero
data.value: Maximum students (MaxStudents) must be greater than 0.

data.name: InternshipPhase.NotFound
data.value: Internship phase not found.

data.name: InternshipPhase.DuplicateName
data.value: An internship phase named '{0}' already exists in this enterprise. Please choose a different name.

data.name: InternshipPhase.DuplicateNameOnUpdate
data.value: Cannot rename to '{0}' because another internship phase in this enterprise already uses this name.

data.name: InternshipPhase.CannotUpdateClosed
data.value: Cannot update internship phase '{0}' because it is in Closed status. Only phases in Draft or Open status can be edited.

data.name: InternshipPhase.CannotDeleteHasActiveGroups
data.value: Cannot delete internship phase '{0}' because there are {1} active internship group(s). Please close or archive all groups before deleting.

data.name: InternshipPhase.CannotDeleteInProgress
data.value: Cannot delete internship phase '{0}' because it is currently InProgress. Please close the phase before deleting.

data.name: InternshipPhase.StartDateNotInPast
data.value: Start date must not be in the past.

data.name: InternshipPhase.StudentNotFound
data.value: Student profile not found for the current account.

data.name: InternshipPhase.UpdateNoChanges
data.value: No changes were saved for the internship phase.

data.name: InternshipPhase.CreateSuccess
data.value: Internship phase created successfully.

data.name: InternshipPhase.UpdateSuccess
data.value: Internship phase updated successfully.

data.name: InternshipPhase.DeleteSuccess
data.value: Internship phase deleted successfully.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.Creating
data.value: Starting to create internship phase '{0}' for enterprise {1}.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.EnterpriseNotFound
data.value: Enterprise with ID {0} not found. Cannot create internship phase.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.DuplicateName
data.value: Internship phase named '{0}' already exists in enterprise {1}. Rejecting creation.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.CreateSuccess
data.value: Internship phase created successfully — PhaseId: {0}, Name: '{1}', Enterprise: {2}.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.CreateError
data.value: Error creating internship phase '{0}' for enterprise {1}. Transaction rolled back.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.Updating
data.value: Starting to update internship phase {0} — new name: '{1}', new status: {2}.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.UpdateNotFound
data.value: Internship phase with ID {0} not found. Update request rejected.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.UpdateClosed
data.value: Rejecting update of internship phase '{0}' (ID: {1}) — phase is in Closed status.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.UpdateDuplicateName
data.value: Rejecting update of internship phase {0} — name '{1}' is already used by another phase in enterprise {2}.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.UpdateSuccess
data.value: Internship phase updated successfully — PhaseId: {0}, Name: '{1}'.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.UpdateNoChanges
data.value: No records saved when updating internship phase {0}. Transaction rolled back.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.UpdateError
data.value: Error updating internship phase {0}. Transaction rolled back.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.Deleting
data.value: Starting to delete internship phase {0}.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.DeleteNotFound
data.value: Internship phase with ID {0} not found. Delete request rejected.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.DeleteHasActiveGroups
data.value: Rejecting deletion of internship phase '{0}' (ID: {1}) — {2} active internship group(s) exist.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.DeleteSuccess
data.value: Internship phase deleted successfully — PhaseId: {0}, Name: '{1}', Enterprise: {2}.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.DeleteNoChanges
data.value: No records saved when deleting internship phase {0}. Transaction rolled back.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.DeleteError
data.value: Error deleting internship phase {0}. Transaction rolled back.

data.value: Getting internship phase list for enterprise {0} — status filter: {1}, page: {2}.

data.value: Returning internship phase list from cache for enterprise {0}.

data.value: Student profile not found for UserId {0}. Request denied.

data.value: EnterpriseUser not found for Mentor userId={0} while retrieving internship phases.

data.value: Mentor profile not found in the system. Please contact your administrator.

data.value: Internship phase status is invalid.

data.name: InternshipPhase.DescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Internship phase description must not exceed 2000 characters.

data.value: Page number must be greater than or equal to 1.

data.value: Page size must be between 1 and 50.

data.value: Cannot transition from '{0}' to '{1}'. Please check the valid status flow.

data.value: You do not have permission to operate on internship phases of this enterprise.

data.value: Enterprise user information not found for the current account.

data.value: Access denied — User {0} attempted to operate on enterprise {1} but belongs to enterprise {2}.

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.InvalidStatusTransition
data.value: Rejected status transition of internship phase {0} from '{1}' to '{2}' — invalid transition.

data.value: Term name already exists. Please choose a different name.

data.value: Project warning

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationProjectCleanupContent
data.value: {0} was removed from the internship group.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationGroupArchivedTitle
data.value: Internship group archived

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationGroupArchivedContent
data.value: Group [{0}] has been archived. Existing projects are kept, but you cannot assign new projects to this group.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationStudentRemovedMentorTitle
data.value: Student removed from group

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationStudentRemovedMentorContent
data.value: {0} was removed from [{1}] by HR. The student can no longer access the group's projects.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationStudentRemovedStudentTitle
data.value: You were removed from group

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationStudentRemovedStudentContent
data.value: You were removed from [{0}]. You can no longer access this group's projects.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationStudentMovedTitle
data.value: You were moved to another group

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationStudentMovedContent
data.value: You were moved to [{0}]. Your project list has been updated.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationMentorOldGroupTitle
data.value: Student transferred out

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationMentorOldGroupContent
data.value: {0} has been moved to another group.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationMentorNewGroupTitle
data.value: Student added to your group

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationMentorNewGroupContent
data.value: {0} was added to [{1}] and automatically joined currently published projects.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationMentorReplacedOldTitle
data.value: You are no longer assigned to this group

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationMentorReplacedOldContent
data.value: Group [{0}] has been reassigned to another mentor. The group and linked projects are removed from your view.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationMentorReplacedNewTitle
data.value: You were assigned as group mentor

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationMentorReplacedNewContent
data.value: You were assigned to group [{0}] (replacing {1}) and now have full edit rights on linked projects.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogProjectAssignmentsCleanup
data.value: Auto-removed {0} assignment(s) for student {1} after leaving group.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogProjectsArchived
data.value: Archived {0} Draft/Published project(s) after group {1} was archived.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogArchiveNotifyFailed
data.value: Group archived but mentor notification failed. InternshipId: {0}.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogMoveNotificationFailed
data.value: Student move succeeded but notification failed. FromGroup: {0}, ToGroup: {1}.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogMentorSwapNotificationFailed
data.value: Mentor reassignment succeeded but notification failed for group {0}.

data.name: Projects.LogOrphanized
data.value: Project {0} was orphaned because its group was deleted.

data.value: Project students retrieved successfully.

data.value: Retrieved students for project {0}.

data.value: Sent ProjectListChanged signal (action={0}) to Mentor {1} for project {2}.

data.name: InternshipGroups.NotificationOrphanTitle
data.value: Internship group deleted

data.name: InternshipGroups.NotificationOrphanContent
data.value: Group [{0}] was dissolved. Linked projects were moved to Unstarted. Please assign a new group.

data.name: InternshipGroups.NotificationGroupDeletedStudentTitle
data.value: Project no longer available

data.name: InternshipGroups.NotificationGroupDeletedStudentContent
data.value: Project [{0}] is no longer available because your internship group was dissolved.

data.name: InternshipGroups.LogOrphanizeProjects
data.value: {0} project(s) orphaned due to group {1} deletion.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogDeleteStudentNotificationFailed
data.value: Group deleted but student notification failed. InternshipId: {0}.

data.name: Projects.CannotAssignArchivedGroup
data.value: Cannot assign project to an archived group.

data.name: Projects.LogGetAll
data.value: Retrieving all projects. SearchTerm: {0}, Status: {1}.

data.name: Projects.LogGetAllSuccess
data.value: Successfully retrieved {0} project(s).

data.name: Projects.LogGetByInternshipId
data.value: Retrieving projects for internship group {0}.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogQueryById
data.value: Querying internship group with ID: {InternshipId} by user {UserId} (role: {Role})

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogScopedHrEnterprise
data.value: HR/EnterpriseAdmin {UserId} → scoped to enterprise {EnterpriseId}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogScopedMentor
data.value: Mentor {UserId} → scoped to MentorId {MentorId}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogScopedStudent
data.value: Student {UserId} → scoped to StudentId {StudentId}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogRetrievedGroups
data.value: Retrieved {Count} internship groups for user {UserId} (role: {Role})

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogStartQueryMine
data.value: Starting mine internship groups query.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogQueryMineCompleted
data.value: Completed mine internship groups query with {Count} groups.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogStartQueryTerms
data.value: Starting get my internship terms query.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogDashboardQuery
data.value: Starting to get dashboard data for InternshipId: {Id}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogDashboardGenerated
data.value: Successfully generated dashboard data for InternshipId: {Id}. TotalTasks: {TaskCount}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogResolvedPhases
data.value: Resolved {Count} phase(s) for enterprise {EnterpriseId}: [{PhaseIds}]

data.name: InternshipGroup.Unassigned
data.value: Unassigned

data.name: InternshipGroup.LateLogbookSubmission
data.value: Late logbook submission

data.name: InternshipGroup.AssignMentorSuccess
data.value: Mentor assigned successfully.

data.name: InternshipGroup.AssignMentorFirstAssignSuccess
data.value: Mentor {0} was assigned to group {1} successfully.

data.name: InternshipGroup.AssignMentorChangeSuccess
data.value: The mentor of group {1} was changed to {0} successfully.

data.name: InternshipGroup.AssignMentorGroupNotFound
data.value: Internship group not found.

data.name: InternshipGroup.AssignMentorGroupNotActive
data.value: Can only assign mentor to active groups.

data.name: InternshipGroup.AssignMentorGroupIdRequired
data.value: Internship group ID must not be empty.

data.name: InternshipGroup.AssignMentorMentorRequired
data.value: Please select a mentor to assign.

data.name: InternshipGroup.AssignMentorSameMentor
data.value: This mentor is already assigned to the group and cannot be assigned again.

data.name: InternshipGroup.AssignMentorConcurrencyConflict
data.value: This internship group was just updated by someone else. Please reload and try again.

data.name: InternshipGroup.Log.AssignMentorSuccess
data.value: Mentor {MentorName} assigned to group {GroupId} successfully.

data.name: InternshipGroup.Log.AssignMentorFailed
data.value: Failed to assign mentor to group {GroupId} due to a system error.

data.name: InternshipGroup.Log.AssignMentorNotifyFailed
data.value: Failed to send notifications after mentor assignment for group {GroupId}, continuing.

data.name: InternshipGroup.Log.AssignMentorSameMentor
data.value: AssignMentor: Mentor {MentorUserId} is already the current mentor of group {GroupId}, skipping.

data.name: InternshipGroup.Log.AssignMentorConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Assign mentor concurrency conflict for group {GroupId}.

data.name: InternshipGroup.AvailableMentorsRetrieved
data.value: Available mentors retrieved successfully.

data.name: InternshipGroup.Log.GetAvailableMentors
data.value: GetAvailableMentors: returned {Count} available mentor(s) for group {GroupId}.

data.name: InternshipGroup.Log.GetAvailableMentorsAccessDenied
data.value: GetAvailableMentors: User {UserId} does not belong to the enterprise of group {GroupId}, access denied.

data.name: InternshipGroup.Log.ApiGetAvailableMentorsRequest
data.value: Request to get available mentors for group: {Id}

data.name: InternshipGroup.Log.ApiAssignOrChangeMentorRequest
data.value: Request to assign/change mentor for group: {Id}

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationMentorAssignedFirstTitle
data.value: You have been assigned a new group

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationMentorAssignedFirstContent
data.value: You have been assigned to mentor group {0} ({1} students). Internship period: {2} → {3}.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationStudentMentorAssignedTitle
data.value: Your group now has a mentor

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationStudentMentorAssignedContent
data.value: Your group {0} now has a mentor: {1}. Contact: {2}.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationStudentMentorChangedTitle
data.value: Your group's mentor has changed

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotificationStudentMentorChangedContent
data.value: The mentor of group {0} has changed. New mentor: {1}. Contact: {2}.

data.name: Profile.LogUpdateStart
data.value: [START] UpdateMyProfile for User: {UserId}

data.name: Profile.LogAuthFailed
data.value: [AUTH_FAILED] User ID not found in context.

data.name: Profile.LogUserNotFound
data.value: [NOT_FOUND] User not found: {UserId}

data.name: Profile.LogUpdateSuccess
data.value: [SUCCESS] Profile updated for User: {UserId}

data.name: Profile.LogUpdateError
data.value: [ERROR] Failed to update profile for User: {UserId}

data.name: Profile.LogCvFileNotFound
data.value: CV file not found in storage for User: {UserId}

data.name: Profile.LogGetProfile
data.value: Getting profile for User {UserId}

data.name: Profile.LogGetProfileUserNotFound
data.value: User {UserId} not found when fetching profile

data.name: JobPosting.UploadCVRequired
data.value: You have not uploaded a CV. Please upload your CV before applying.

data.name: JobPosting.CannotApplyWhenPlaced
data.value: You are in Placed status and are not allowed to apply.

data.name: JobPosting.PositionNotOpenForApplication
data.value: This position is currently not open for application.

data.name: JobPosting.ApplicationDeadlinePassed
data.value: The application deadline has passed.

data.name: JobPosting.NoActiveInternshipPeriod
data.value: There is currently no active internship period to apply for.

data.name: JobPosting.AlreadyHaveActiveApplication
data.value: You already have an active application and cannot submit another one.

data.name: JobPosting.ApplicationLimitReached
data.value: You have reached the application limit for this position.

data.name: JobPosting.StudentAppliedToEnterpriseJob
data.value: {0} has applied for the position at {1} — {2}. Please review.

data.name: JobPosting.ApplySuccessPendingHR
data.value: Application successful! Your application is pending HR review.

data.name: JobPosting.InternshipInProgress
data.value: You are currently doing an internship.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.StudentsRetrieved
data.value: Student internship list retrieved successfully.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.StudentDetailRetrieved
data.value: Student detail retrieved successfully.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.StudentLogbookTotalRetrieved
data.value: Student logbook summary retrieved successfully.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.StudentLogbookWeeklyRetrieved
data.value: Student weekly logbook retrieved successfully.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.EvaluationsRetrieved
data.value: Student evaluations retrieved successfully.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.ViolationsRetrieved
data.value: Student violations retrieved successfully.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.NoOpenTermFound
data.value: No open internship term found for your university. List is empty.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.Log.TermNotFound
data.value: Term not found for termId={0}.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.Log.TermAccessDenied
data.value: SchoolAdmin {0} attempted to access term {1} not belonging to university {2}.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.Log.StudentNotFound
data.value: Student {0} not found in term {1} for university {2}.

data.name: UniAdminInternship.Log.NoOpenTerm
data.value: No open internship term found for university {0}.

data.value: Late

data.value: Submitted

data.value: Holiday

data.value: Pending

data.name: UniAdminInternship.StatusBadge.Missing
data.value: Missing

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.DeleteInProgress
data.value: Rejected deletion of internship phase '{0}' (ID: {1}) — phase is in InProgress status and cannot be deleted.

data.name: InternshipPhase.InternshipPhaseIdRequired
data.value: Internship Phase ID is required.

data.name: JobPosting.UpdateNotifyStudentSubject
data.value: Job Posting Updated

data.name: JobPosting.UpdateNotifyStudentBody
data.value: Job Posting [{0}] at {1} has been updated. Please review the job posting details.

data.name: JobPosting.InvalidStatus
data.value: Job posting status is invalid.

data.name: JobPosting.ChangeInternPhaseBlockedDueToActiveApplications
data.value: The post currently has {0} candidates. It's not possible to change the Intern Phase while candidates are being processed. Please close the post and process the candidates first.

data.name: JobPosting.InvalidStatusForReopen
data.value: Invalid job posting status for reopen operation.

data.name: JobPosting.ExpireDateMustBeFuture
data.value: Expiration date must be a future date.

data.name: JobPosting.ExpireDateExceedsPhaseEndDate
data.value: Expiration date cannot exceed the internship phase end date.

data.name: JobPosting.ReopenJobPostingSuccessNotificationMessage
data.value: Job posting has been successfully reopened.

data.name: JobPosting.QuantityCannotBeLessThanPlaced
data.value: Quantity cannot be less than the number of candidates already placed.

data.name: JobPosting.DraftNoApplications
data.value: Draft job must not have applications.

data.name: JobPosting.JobPlacedMaxed
data.value: Internship period {0} is full ([{1}]/[{2}] students have been booked). You can close job postings during this period if you do not wish to receive more applications.

data.name: JobPosting.InternshipPhaseStatusAllowed
data.value: Only allow selecting phases that are Open (Upcoming) or InProgress (Active)

data.name: InternshipPhase.Log.ByIdTabsLoaded
data.value: Internship phase {0} detail loaded — {1} job posting(s), {2} placed student(s).

data.name: HRApplications.InternPhaseAtCapacity
data.value: The internship phase has reached its maximum capacity.

data.name: HRApplications.ApplicationNotPlaced
data.value: The application is not in Placed status.

data.name: HRApplications.Log.RemovePlacedUniAssign
data.value: HR removed student from Placed list (ApplicationId: {0}, ByUserId: {1}).

data.name: StudentApplications.Notify.Student.RemovedPlaced
data.value: Dear student, enterprise {EnterpriseName} has removed you from their internship acceptance list.

data.name: StudentApplications.Notify.UniAdmin.RemovedPlaced
data.value: Student {StudentName} has been removed from the internship acceptance list by enterprise {EnterpriseName}.

data.name: StudentApplications.NotFound
data.value: Application not found.

data.name: StudentApplications.NotOwner
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action on this application.

data.name: StudentApplications.CannotWithdrawNotApplied
data.value: Only applications in Applied status can be withdrawn.

data.name: StudentApplications.CannotHidePlaced
data.value: Placed applications cannot be hidden.

data.name: StudentApplications.CannotHideActiveApplication
data.value: Only terminal applications (Rejected or Withdrawn) can be hidden.

data.name: StudentApplications.WithdrawSuccess
data.value: Application withdrawn successfully.

data.name: StudentApplications.HideSuccess
data.value: Application hidden from your list.

data.name: StudentApplications.Notify.HR.Withdrawn
data.value: {StudentName} has withdrawn their application for {JobTitle}.

data.name: Validation.IdRequired
data.value: Application ID is required.

data.name: Validation.PageNumberInvalid
data.value: PageNumber must be greater than or equal to 1.

data.name: Validation.PageSizeInvalid
data.value: PageSize must be greater than or equal to 1.

data.name: Validation.InvalidStatus
data.value: Status is invalid.

data.name: JobPosting.ExpireDateCanNotBeAfterPhaseStartDate
data.value: ExpireDate {0} cannot be after internship phase start date {1}.

data.name: University.HasActiveTerms
data.value: Cannot delete university: active terms exist.

data.name: University.HasInterningStudents
data.value: Cannot delete university: students are currently interning.

data.name: Enterprise.HasInterningStudents
data.value: Cannot delete enterprise: students are currently interning.

data.name: Enterprise.TaxCodeRequired
data.value: Tax Code is required.

data.name: Enterprise.TaxCodeInvalid
data.value: Invalid Tax Code format (e.g. 10 digits or 10 digits followed by suffix).

data.name: Enterprise.NameRequired
data.value: Enterprise Name is required.

data.name: Enterprise.ContactEmailInvalid
data.value: Invalid Contact Email format.
